rules.Name: Do not use unnecessary columns
rules.Expression: not(Model.Tables.Any(t => t.Columns.Contains(this)) and IsHidden = false and UsedInRelationships.Count = 0 and UsedInSortBy.Count = 0)
rules.Description: Unused visible columns bloat model size and confuse self-service users.

rules.Name: Measures must use Sentence case, no abbreviations
rules.Description: Enforces the team naming standard so self-service users can read measure names without a glossary.

rules.Name: Avoid bi-directional relationships unless explicitly justified
rules.Description: Bi-directional filtering is a common source of ambiguous filter context and performance issues.

rules.Name: Relationship keys must not be floating point
rules.Description: Floating point join keys risk silent mismatches.

rules.Name: Every measure must have a description
rules.Description: Descriptions surface as tooltips in Power BI Service, making self-service reporting usable without a data dictionary.
